This folder keeps the repo-level notes out of the root while preserving a
clear front door for active work.

ulist:
[`campaign`](campaign): campaign plans, opcode conclusion notes, and the
milestone archive that supports [`RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md.json`](RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md.json#/body)

[`workflows`](workflows): session instructions, strategy notes, and

[`research`](research): broader analysis notes that are useful context but

content.raw_markdown:
# Docs

This folder keeps the repo-level notes out of the root while preserving a
clear front door for active work.

## Layout

- [`campaign`](campaign): campaign plans, opcode conclusion notes, and the
  milestone archive that supports [`../RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md`](../RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md)
- [`workflows`](workflows): session instructions, strategy notes, and
  tool-specific workflows
- [`research`](research): broader analysis notes that are useful context but
  are not the active campaign ledger

## Start Here

- Active opcode/decomp state:
  [`../RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md`](../RE_CAMPAIGN_MEMORY.md)
- Artifact catalog:
  [`campaign/RE_CAMPAIGN_ARTIFACT_INDEX.md`](campaign/RE_CAMPAIGN_ARTIFACT_INDEX.md)
- Workflow and standards:
  [`workflows/DECOMPILATION_STRATEGY.md`](workflows/DECOMPILATION_STRATEGY.md),
  [`workflows/CLI_DECOMPILATION_WORKFLOW.md`](workflows/CLI_DECOMPILATION_WORKFLOW.md),
  [`workflows/AI_RE_PASS_WORKFLOW.md`](workflows/AI_RE_PASS_WORKFLOW.md)
- Archived campaign history:
  [`campaign/RE_CAMPAIGN_HISTORY.md`](campaign/RE_CAMPAIGN_HISTORY.md)

# Docs

This folder keeps the repo-level notes out of the root while preserving a
clear front door for active work.

## Layout

- [`campaign`](campaign): campaign plans, opcode conclusion notes, and the
